auth_login_desc: Enter your credentials to sign in
projects_empty_search: No projects match your search. Try a different query.
projects_empty_create: Get started by creating your first project.
project_new_desc: Create a new project to organize your test cases
project_desc_placeholder: Describe what this project is about...
settings_deactivate_desc: Deactivating a project will hide it from the project list. This action can be reversed by an administrator.
settings_deactivate_confirm: Are you sure you want to deactivate "{name}"? The project will be hidden from the project list.
members_desc: Manage project team members and their roles
members_add_desc: Search for a user to add to this project
members_remove_confirm: Are you sure you want to remove {name} from this project? They will lose all access.
tc_empty_search: No test cases match your filters. Try adjusting your search.
tc_empty_create: Get started by creating your first test case.
tc_new_desc: Create a new test case with steps and expected results
tc_detail_delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{key}"? This action cannot be undone and will remove all version history.
tr_empty_filter: No test runs match this filter.
tr_empty_create: Create a test run to start executing test cases.
tr_new_desc: Configure a test run and select test cases to execute
tr_no_cases: No test cases in this project. Create test cases first.
fail_mark_desc: Record failure details for this test execution
fail_delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this failure detail? This action cannot be undone.
admin_ban_confirm: Are you sure you want to ban "{name}"? They will not be able to log in.
attachments_delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This cannot be undone.
tag_empty: No tags yet. Create your first tag.
tag_delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? It will be removed from all test cases.
tag_duplicate: A tag with this name already exists
group_delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this group? Test cases in it will be moved to Uncategorized.
lock_conflict: {name} is currently editing this test case
tc_bulk_delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete {count} test cases? This cannot be undone.
oidc_no_providers_hint: Add a provider to enable SSO login.
oidc_delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"?
oidc_has_accounts_warning: This provider has linked accounts. It will be disabled instead of deleted.
oidc_no_auto_register: Auto-registration is disabled for this provider
tc_import_desc: Upload a CSV or JSON file
tr_delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this test run? All execution data will be permanently removed.
tr_retest_desc: Creates a new run with only FAIL and BLOCKED test cases from this run.
tr_retest_no_failures: No failed or blocked executions to retest
tr_edit_created_only: Only CREATED runs can be edited
suite_desc_placeholder: Describe the purpose of this suite...
suite_empty_desc: Create a suite to group reusable test case collections.
suite_delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this suite? This will not delete the test cases themselves.
suite_no_cases: No test cases in this suite.
tc_pagination_notice: Showing paginated view ({count} total test cases). Drag-and-drop reordering is disabled in this mode.
profile_preferences_desc: Language and theme settings are synced across devices
comment_empty: No comments yet. Start the discussion!
comment_delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this comment?
template_delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This cannot be undone.
api_keys_desc: Manage API keys for CI/CD automation integration
api_keys_empty: No API keys yet. Generate one to start using CI integration.
api_key_generate_desc: Give this key a descriptive name (e.g., GitHub Actions, GitLab CI)
api_key_revoke_confirm: Are you sure you want to revoke "{name}"? Any CI pipelines using this key will stop working.
api_key_copy_warning: Store this key securely. It will not be shown again.
api_key_created_desc: Copy and store this key securely. It will not be shown again after you close this dialog.
api_key_close_without_copy: You haven't copied the key yet. You won't be able to see it again after closing this dialog. Are you sure?
unsaved_changes_desc: You have unsaved changes. If you leave this page, your changes will be lost.
date_range_invalid: Start date cannot be after end date
admin_branding_desc: Customize the application name, logo, and favicon
admin_branding_logo_desc: Displayed in the header. Recommended: square image, at least 64x64px.
admin_branding_favicon_desc: Browser tab icon. Recommended: square image, at least 32x32px.
pending_desc: Your account is awaiting administrator approval. You'll be able to use the system once approved.
admin_approve_confirm: Approve {name}? They will gain access to the system.
admin_reject_confirm: Reject {name}? Their account will be removed.
priority_empty: No priorities configured. Add your first priority.
priority_duplicate: A priority with this name already exists
priority_delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? Test cases using this priority will keep their current value.
env_desc: Manage project environments for test runs
env_empty: No environments configured. Add your first environment.
env_duplicate: An environment with this name already exists
env_delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? Test runs using this environment will keep their current value.
env_memo_placeholder: VPN required, data resets daily at 9am, etc.
webhook_desc: Configure outgoing webhooks to receive notifications in Slack or other services when events occur.
webhook_delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"?
webhook_empty: No webhooks configured. Add your first webhook to receive notifications.
notification_preferences_desc: Choose which notifications you receive in-app.
trends_flaky_desc: Tests that alternate between PASS and FAIL across recent runs
comment_mention_hint: Use @name to mention a project member
stale_tests_desc: Test cases not executed recently or never executed
custom_field_desc: Define custom fields for test cases in this project
custom_field_delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? Values in existing test cases will be preserved but the field will no longer appear.
custom_field_empty: No custom fields defined. Add your first custom field.
issue_tracker_desc: Connect to an external issue tracker to create and link issues from test failures
issue_tracker_delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to remove the issue tracker configuration?
req_desc: Link requirements to test cases for traceability
req_delete_confirm: This will permanently delete this requirement and all its test case links.
req_no_requirements: No requirements yet. Add your first requirement to start building the traceability matrix.
dataset_empty: No data sets. Add a row to start defining test data.
exploratory_new_desc: Start a new exploratory testing session
exploratory_charter_placeholder: Describe the test charter or mission...
exploratory_empty_hint: Start a new session to begin exploratory testing.
exploratory_complete_desc: Finish this session and add a summary of your findings.
exploratory_summary_placeholder: Summarize your findings, bugs discovered, areas covered...
exploratory_delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this session? All notes and screenshots will be permanently removed.
exploratory_note_placeholder: Write a note, observation, or finding...
exploratory_no_notes: No notes yet. Add your first observation.
approval_reject_desc: Please provide a reason for rejecting this test case.
gherkin_editor_hint: Write steps using Given / When / Then / And / But keywords. One step per line.
gherkin_editor_placeholder:
Given the user is on the login page
When the user enters valid credentials
Then the user should see the dashboard
tp_empty_create: Create a test plan to organize your testing strategy.
tp_delete_confirm: Are you sure? Linked test runs will be preserved.
tp_no_cases: No test cases in this plan yet.
tp_no_runs: No test runs created from this plan yet.
team_empty_create: Create a team to organize your projects.
team_delete_confirm: Are you sure? Projects will be unassigned but preserved.
rel_empty_create: Create a release to track test progress across versions.
rel_delete_confirm: Delete this release? Linked plans and runs will be unlinked.
settings_require_signoff: Require sign-off before completing test plans
retest_create_run_desc: Create a test run from all test cases marked as needing retest.
retest_run_created: Retest run created with {count} test cases
comparison_not_retest: This run is not a retest run
slowest_tests_desc: Tests with the highest average execution duration
defect_density_desc: Number of linked defects per test case group
cycle_delete_confirm: Delete this cycle? Linked runs will be unlinked.
cycle_empty_create: Create a test cycle to organize your testing iterations.
module_delete_confirm: Delete this module? Test cases will be unlinked.
cross_env_no_data: Select at least 2 runs to compare
req_unlink_confirm: Are you sure you want to unlink test case {key} from this requirement?
admin_confirm_activate: Are you sure you want to activate this project?
admin_confirm_deactivate: Are you sure you want to deactivate this project? Members will no longer be able to access it.
